mapper.select: SELECT a.*, j.title AS job_title, c.name AS company_name FROM applications a LEFT JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.applied_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO applications (user_id, job_id, resume_url, notes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, #{resumeUrl}, #{notes})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId}
